hero.name: Abdessamad
hero.section3body: Turning complex problems into elegant, high-performance interfaces. My focus is on writing clean, scalable code that elevates the user experience.

frontend.title: Frontend Architecture
frontend.description: Designing scalable, maintainable, and high-performance frontend systems for enterprise applications using React, Next.js, and TypeScript.

fullstack.title: Full-Stack Development
fullstack.description: Building scalable and high-performance end-to-end applications with Laravel, Express.js, and Spring Boot backends, paired with modern, user-focused interfaces.

performance.title: Performance Optimization
performance.description: Identifying bottlenecks and implementing strategies across the stack to ensure lightning-fast load times and smooth rendering.

uiux.title: UI/UX Engineering
uiux.description: Translating complex design systems into pixel-perfect, accessible, and responsive digital experiences.

laundry.title: Laundry Service Platform
laundry.description: End-to-end laundry management with order tracking, delivery logistics, and admin analytics.

about.title: About
about.p1: I am a Full Stack Developer and Digital Craftsman with hands-on experience building scalable, high-performance web applications for real-world use cases. I bridge the gap between aesthetic design and robust engineering.
about.p2: Strong expertise in React.js, Spring Boot, and Laravel, with hands-on experience designing RESTful APIs, integrating backend services, and solving complex technical challenges including OCR integration with Python.
about.p3: Trained at ISTA Ifrane in Full Stack Web Development, delivering end-to-end projects with clean, maintainable code. Solid foundation in Agile/Scrum methodologies and experienced in collaborating closely with product and business stakeholders.
about.p4: Currently open to junior full-stack roles with a focus on product-driven teams, long-term growth, and impactful digital experiences.

testimonials.title: Client
testimonials.subtitle: What People Say About Me
testimonials.t1quote: This platform completely transformed how we run our laundry business. Before, everything was tracked manually — phone calls, paper notes, constant confusion. Now our livreurs, employees, and admin all work from the same system in real time. Orders are created instantly, statuses update automatically, and deliveries are tracked without a single call. It simplified the entire operation and saved us hours every day.

contact.title: Let's Work
contact.subtitle: Currently open to full-stack roles in Morocco or remote. Whether you have an enterprise project or a creative vision to bring to life, I'd love to hear from you.
contact.placeholderProject: What do you want to build?
contact.formHint: A short message is enough. Include your goal, timeline, or the main problem you want solved.
contact.errorRequired: Please fill in all required fields (Name, Email, Project).
contact.successMessage: Message sent successfully! I will get back to you soon.
contact.errorFallback: Failed to send message. Please try again.

laundry.title: Laundry Service Management Platform
laundry.description: A complete end-to-end platform for managing laundry orders, delivery logistics, and real-time admin analytics.
laundry.step1desc: Visits the client, registers them, creates an order in the app, and physically brings the laundry to the shop.
laundry.step2desc: Dashboard updates with the new order. Takes the physical items, follows the order details, cleans the clothes, and marks the order as Ready for Delivery.
laundry.step3desc: Sees the updated order status, picks up the clean clothes, and delivers them back to the client.
laundry.step4desc: Watches the entire lifecycle through the analytics dashboard and orchestrates users assigned to each task.
laundry.ctaSubtitle: Feel free to reach out or check the source code on GitHub.
